remainingBottlenecks: Admin mutation + sync_event is still not DB-atomic; current patch adds retry compensation without silent success.
Browser lateral blocks the staging QA fixture route with net::ERR_BLOCKED_BY_CLIENT, so official final T0_ui_submit cannot be produced through that route in this run.
Android/iOS live device harnesses were not running with a new final SYNC_PERF event, so T5-T8 and A-F live matrix cannot be claimed.
Admin realtime browser code is deployed and the authenticated page opens, but T4/T9 were not verified with a new live event after deploy.
